name: polpo-ui
description: UI components for building AI agent interfaces with Polpo

scripts.dev:docs: portless ui.polpo pnpm --filter docs exec next dev
scripts.dev:example-chat: cd examples/chat && portless example-chat.polpo next dev
scripts.dev:example-chat-widget: cd examples/chat-widget && portless example-chat-widget.polpo next dev
scripts.dev:example-multi-agent: cd examples/multi-agent && portless example-multi-agent.polpo next dev
